'''Ulan Squadron''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] starfighter squadron composed of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]]. It saw service in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] where, in the end, it was destroyed.

Ulan Squadron had its final fight in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. When a Rebel convoy was ambushed there by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was sent to help. The ambush itself included [[Immobilizer 418 cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'' so, recognizing this, Ulan was given a load of torpedoes and charged with driving it away. However, the rescue was a failure. Ulan Squadron was wiped out together with the convoy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
